decision.reasoning_trace: Based on the product feed, I selected a consideration set of 5 products that best meet the customer's needs for running shoes. The top factors considered were product rating, review count, price, and brand reputation. The Brooks Women's Adrenaline GTS 22 Supportive Running Shoe (prod_running_shoes_119) was chosen as the final product due to its high rating (4.5), large number of reviews (9559), and competitive price ($119.95). The other products in the consideration set, including the Brooks Womens Glycerin 18 Running Shoe (prod_running_shoes_059), New Balance Men's 510 V5 Trail Running Shoe (prod_running_shoes_116), ASICS Men's Gel-Quantum 360 Knit 2 Men's Running Shoe (prod_running_shoes_190), and Nike Women's Running Shoe (prod_running_shoes_199), were also strong contenders but were ultimately out-ranked by the Brooks Women's Adrenaline GTS 22.
